title: Target's FPS Boost
description: A FPS boost pack which can help low-end pc players to play smoothly 🤩
body: Targets Modpack is a lightweight Fabric modpack built for maximum FPS and smooth gameplay on low-end PCs. It includes over 40 performance and PvP utility mods like Sodium, Lithium, ModernFix, and Totem Counter to give you stable frames, faster loading, and a clean PvP HUD — all without shaders or extra lag. Perfect for players who want pure speed, stability, and a better Minecraft experience.
